Fisher & Paykel Nova Nasal CPAP Mask - FitPack COMING SOON

Fisher & Paykel Nova Nasal CPAP Mask - FitPack COMING SOON

$170.00
Product description

The Fisher & Paykel Nova Nasal CPAP Mask is designed to provide a secure, comfortable seal with minimal noise and simple, intuitive fitting. It's one-click SwingFit headgear allows for quick adjustments, while the movement-responsive RollFit cushion adapts as you move to help maintain seal integrity throughout the night. Pivoting clips enhance stability without limiting natural movement, and the washable diffuser helps reduce airflow noise and draft. With an open field of view and features that support multiple sleep positions, the Nova Nasal delivers consistent, comfortable therapy night after night. FitPack includes three sizes: Small, Medium, and Large, for a flexible, comfortable fit.

Key Features

SwingFit™ Headgear: F&P Nova Nasal’s SwingFit headgear easily swings around the head, then naturally aligns to the frame for an easy fasten.

RollFit™ Cushion: The mask’s refined RollFit cushion sits lower on the nose for a clear field of view and works in synergy with SwingFit headgear for a stable seal.

Washable Diffuser: The washable diffuser minimises noise and draft for your patients and those around them.

Tube Clip Connection: F&P Nova Nasal provides patients with the option of over-the-head tube placement.

AirEdge™ Fabric: For a comfortable sleep, F&P Nova Nasal’s stability arms are wrapped in AirEdge fabric to help avoid marks on the face.

This product includes:

  • 1 x Short Tube
  • 3 x Cushions (Small, Medium, and Large)
  • 1 x Swivel
  • 1 x Diffuser (washable)
  • 1 x Headgear (Medium/Large size)
  • 1 x Headgear Pad (optional use)
  • 1 x Tubing Clip (optional use)
  • 1 x User Instructions

This mask does not contain magnets, making it a safe choice for individuals concerned about magnetic interference.

Unsure of your size? Click the size guide below

Size Guide

Materials

  • Headgear: Acetal (POM), Nylon (PA), PEBA, Polyurethane (PU)

  • Cushion: Silicone, Polycarbonate (PC)

  • Frame: Polycarbonate (PC)

  • Diffuser: Polycarbonate (PC), PET

  • Tube Clip: Acetal (POM)

  • Tube: Polycarbonate (PC), Polyurethane (PU)

  • Swivel: Nylon (PA)

  • Headgear Pad: Acrylic (PMMA), Polyethylene (PE)

Support for Your Mask Setup: The F&P myMask™ App is available to help you confidently set up and adjust your mask at home. By scanning the QR code below, you can download the app from the App Store or Google Play. The app provides step-by-step guidance to help you achieve the correct fit, fine-tune comfort, and properly clean and maintain your F&P CPAP mask. It’s a convenient way to support your therapy and ensure your mask is working as it should.

FAQs

Please read our FAQs page to find out more.

Do I need a diagnosis to shop here?

Not at all. Many people come here simply to explore everyday care products or support what they’re already experiencing. You don’t need a diagnosis, a label, or a specific reason to be here — just curiosity or a desire to feel supported.

Are these just medical products?

Not at all. Many of the items here are everyday care products — things people use regularly to support comfort, balance, confidence, and wellness. Think practical, familiar, and thoughtfully chosen.

Do you offer prescriptions or professional support?

If you’re looking for more support, we do offer access to consultations, treatments, and prescriptions where appropriate. These are always optional and handled with care, privacy, and respect.

Can I talk to someone if I’m not sure what I need?

Absolutely. If you have questions, want reassurance, or just need help choosing between a few options, our care team is here. There’s no pressure to know what to ask — we’ll meet you where you are.

How do I know what’s right for me?

You’re the expert on your own life. We’re here to offer options, guidance if you want it, and support along the way — but the choice is always yours.

Didn’t find your answer?

Don't hestitate to contact us
